# ertodebana

> Technical writing on DevOps, platform engineering, AI, and cloud-native systems in Turkish and English.

## Primary

- [Türkçe ana sayfa](https://ertodebana.github.io/): Varsayılan dilde güncel yazılar.
- [English homepage](https://ertodebana.github.io/en/): English version of the site.
- [Türkçe hakkında](https://ertodebana.github.io/hakkinda/): Blogun kapsamı ve odak alanları.
- [About in English](https://ertodebana.github.io/en/about/): Scope and focus of the blog.

## Navigation

- [Türkçe arşiv](https://ertodebana.github.io/arsiv/)
- [English archive](https://ertodebana.github.io/en/archive/)
- [Türkçe kategoriler](https://ertodebana.github.io/kategoriler/)
- [English categories](https://ertodebana.github.io/en/categories/)
- [Türkçe etiketler](https://ertodebana.github.io/etiketler/)
- [English tags](https://ertodebana.github.io/en/tags/)

## Optional

- [LLMs full index](https://ertodebana.github.io/llms-full.txt): Full list of article URLs in both languages.
